name: 现代报告 - 黑白
description: 简约现代的报告风格，高对比度黑白灰，配合精致的边框装饰，适合深度调研、周报总结、商业规划

h1.base: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: #000000; text-align: left; padding: 0 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 4px solid #000000; margin-top: 40px; margin-bottom: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.02em

h2.base: font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; color: #000000; background: #f0f0f0; padding: 8px 12px; margin-top: 36px; margin-bottom: 16px; border-left: 6px solid #000000

h3.base: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #333333; margin-top: 28px; margin-bottom: 12px; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 6px

base.base: font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: #000000; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px

styles.paragraph: font-size: 16px; color: #333333; line-height: 1.75; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: left
styles.quote: background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin: 24px 0; color: #444444; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.75; border: 1px solid #eeeeee

header.container: display: flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #333

code.block: background: #1e1e1e; border-radius: 6px; margin: 24px 0; overflow: hidden; color: #d4d4d4
code.inline: background: #f3f3f3; padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 85%; color: #c7254e; font-family: Consolas, monospace

styles.image: max-width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; display: block; border: 1px solid #ddd; margin: 0 auto

table.header: padding: 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #333

styles.hr: margin: 40px 0; height: 2px; background: #000; border: none; width: 100%
